reach_why: It sharpens existing skepticism about generative originality, but does not open clearly new explanatory territory.
novelty_why: It non-obviously links style imitation, abstract retrieval, and burden-of-proof standards for architecture-only claims.
falsifiable_why: Its claims can be tested by controlled ablations separating stylistic fluency, retrieval, and narrowing effects.
explanation: Apparent creative rediscovery may be retrieval; architecture-only claims need evidence isolating narrowing from pretrained knowledge.
